summary: First-iteration full E2E test for Nursing College ERP MVP. Backend: 20/20 pytest cases passed covering auth (login/register/me/logout/RBAC), Students/Faculty/Courses CRUD, Fees create+pay+receipt enrichment, Attendance upsert by (student_id,date,type), and Dashboard stats schema. Frontend: login + admin dashboard + sidebar nav + courses (3 seeded) + students CRUD (UI dialog) + role-based nav for student verified working end-to-end. Cookies-based auth round-trips correctly through ingress.

minor.issue: allow_origins='*' combined with allow_credentials=True is rejected by browsers per spec. Currently same-origin so works through ingress, but will break cross-origin. Should switch to explicit origin (REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL host) or env-driven CORS_ORIGINS=specific URL.
Uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup' | 'shutdown'). Should migrate to lifespan context manager (FastAPI >=0.93).

issues: Date of Birth uses native HTML5 <input type='date'> (mm/dd/yyyy browser picker) instead of shadcn Calendar/Popover component. Inconsistent with shadcn design system.
Form input fields lack data-testid and name attributes - only submit buttons are tagged. Reduces testability and accessibility.

action_items: Replace native date input in StudentsPage New Admission dialog with shadcn Calendar/Popover for consistency.
Add data-testid (and name) to all dialog form inputs across Students/Faculty/Fees/Attendance pages, e.g. student-name-input, student-email-input, etc., to improve testability.
Tighten CORS: set CORS_ORIGINS to the explicit frontend origin in backend/.env (currently '*' with allow_credentials=True is browser-rejected for true cross-origin scenarios).
Optional: migrate startup/shutdown handlers to FastAPI lifespan context manager (deprecation).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py ~640 lines - approaching the 700-line guideline; consider splitting into auth.py, models.py, routers/students.py etc. for maintainability.
set_auth_cookies uses secure=False - acceptable for HTTP preview but should be True in production (driven by env).
/api/fees/{id}/pay generates receipt_no from int(datetime.now().timestamp()) - collision risk if two payments occur in same second; consider uuid suffix.
list_fees / list_attendance enrich rows but mutate r in-place without ensuring student exists; safe today but worth a guard.
All endpoints exclude _id properly (good). All routes correctly prefixed /api (good). bcrypt hashes ($2b$) verified via login round-trip.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of critical flows tested (login, dashboard, sidebar, courses, students CRUD via UI, role-based nav, logout)

test_credentials: admin@nursingcollege.edu/admin123, principal@nursingcollege.edu/principal123, faculty@nursingcollege.edu/faculty123, student@nursingcollege.edu/student123 - all seeded and verified working.
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds admin + 3 demo users + 3 courses (BSC-NUR, GNM, MSC-NUR) on startup. Idempotent. Verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and pass 20/20 against the public preview URL. Dialog inputs in StudentsPage have no name/data-testid - to fill them in Playwright use positional: page.locator('[role="dialog"] input').nth(0)=Name, .nth(1)=Email, .nth(2)=Phone, .nth(3)=DOB, .nth(4)=BatchYear, .nth(5)=Scholarship, .nth(6)=ParentName, .nth(7)=ParentPhone, .nth(8)=Address. Submit button data-testid='student-save-button'. Add-student button data-testid='add-student-button'. The native window.confirm() is used for delete - handle with page.on('dialog', lambda d: d.accept()).
rca of the issue: N/A - no critical bugs. Minor design/code-quality issues only.
